transcript:
Speaker A: Hello, what is your name?
Speaker B: My name is Rahul.
Speaker A: How old are you?
Speaker B: I have 22.
Speaker C: I have 22 nahi, I am 22 years old hota hai. [Not 'I have 22', it is 'I am 22 years old'.]
Speaker B: Okay okay, I am 22 years old.
Speaker A: Where are you from?
Speaker B: I am Uttar Pradesh.
Speaker C: I am Uttar Pradesh nahi, I am from Uttar Pradesh hoga. [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.]
Speaker B: Oh... theek hai. Mujhe English acche se nahi aati. [Oh... okay. I don't know English very well.]
Speaker C: Koi problem nahi. AI teachers try kiya? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?]
Speaker B: Wo to mehnge hote honge na? [They must be expensive, right?]
Speaker C: Bilkul nahi. Normal English classes se 7x cheaper hai. Isliye 50 lakh log MySivi par English practice kar rahe hain. [Not at all. It is 7x cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Speaker B: Par time nahi milta. [But I don't get time.]
Speaker C: Roz ki sirf 15-20 minute ki practice kaafi hai. Bilkul confident ho jaogi. [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]
Speaker B: Wow, kaise join karun? [Wow, how do I join?]
Speaker C: Ye install ka button dabao aur MySivi app install karo. Sirf 15 dino mein tumhe improvement dikhne lagegi. Chalo shuru ho jao. [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Come on, get started.]
Speaker D: Install Now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]

summary: An interactive skit where an AI portrait corrects a man's English grammar mistakes in real-time. The AI then introduces the MySivi app as an affordable, time-efficient solution for learning English. The ad concludes with a call-to-action prompting users to install the app.
